title: campanula rotundifolia var. cochleariifolia
intro: Campanula rotundifolia var. cochleariifolia, also known as Bluebells-of-scotland or Bellflower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Campanula rotundifolia var. cochleariifolia are said to include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, or other remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
